tagline: The simpler, faster alternative to Jira
description: A focused alternative to Jira that fixes the top user complaints. Built for Project Management who need the core functionality without the bloat.

features.name: Core Workspace
features.description: The main product area — fast, clean, no bloat.

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Get users to first value in under 5 minutes.

features.name: Team Sharing
features.description: Share and collaborate without per-seat fees.

features.name: Integrations
features.description: Connect to the tools your users already use.

target_audience: Indie developers and small teams frustrated with Jira's complexity and pricing.
pricing_model: Free tier (limited). Pro at $9/month flat. No per-seat fees.
mvp_summary: Ship the one thing Jira does poorly, done right. Get 10 paying users before adding anything else.
